items.text:
CASTING CALL – EDINBURGH FRINGE 2026 (NEW WRITING) OXFORD BASED
We are seeking a male actor (playing age 17–20) for the role of Ruairi O’Shea in William Street by Chloe Downes, heading to the Edinburgh Fringe Festival 2026.

Following a successful Oxford run (excellent audience response), we are remounting the production for Edinburgh Fringe with a small, tight-knit ensemble cast.

ABOUT THE PLAY

William Street is a gripping new drama set in Derry during the Troubles, exploring the impact of political conflict on one family at the centre of the violence  the O’Shea family.

At the heart of the story is Ruairi O’Shea, the youngest son, who becomes increasingly influenced by the violence surrounding him and is drawn towards extremist beliefs. As tensions rise within the family, Ruairi’s journey becomes central to a story about loyalty, ideology, and the personal cost of conflict.

The play explores love, betrayal, identity, and sacrifice as political unrest fractures a family from within.

KEY DETAILS

* Edinburgh Fringe Festival: 13th–22nd August 2026
* Rehearsals: June–August (must have strong availability)
* Small ensemble cast (5 actors total)
* Fast-paced, collaborative rehearsal process
* Must be fully available for the full Fringe run

WE ARE LOOKING FOR

* Male actor, playing age 17–20
* Strong dramatic ability and emotional range
* Confident working in ensemble-driven theatre
* Northern Irish accent (or strong ability to adopt one)
* Reliable, committed, and available for rehearsals + Fringe run

TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot & CV
* Brief note of interest
* Availability (June–August)
* Spotlight/showreel (if available)

Self-tape details will be sent to selected applicants.

📩 Apply to: thefifthactco@gmail.com

We are casting on a rolling basis and aim to move quickly once the right performer is found.

Company info

Instagram: @thefifthactco
Website: thefifthactcompany.co.uk

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called Just Go - The Day I left Kevin Costner 
I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 
I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.
You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.
Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 
I'm excited to hear from you. 
Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40706407/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_1_tt_8_nm_0_in_0_q_just%20go%20the%20day 

Please watch the directors site, the facebppk movie site and the imdb Site

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

ATLANTA, ATLANTA,G GA NON-UNION PAID ($300+/DAY) ($300+ SUBMIT: S.JOHNSONSTUDIOSATLOGMAIL.COM'

items.text:
🎬 MODELKA – WARSZAWA 🎬

Poszukujemy standinki/modelki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego.

📅 Termin: 13 czerwca 2026 r. (sobota)
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa
💰 Stawka: 140 zł
⏱ Czas pracy: do 7 godzin

🔎 Wymagania:
• wiek 16–18 lat
• uroda słowiańska
• blond włosy
• ciemna oprawa oczu

ℹ️ Informacje dodatkowe:
• wizerunek oraz głos nie będą wykorzystywane w filmie
• doświadczenie nie jest wymagane

📧 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: **MODELKA**

W treści maila prosimy o podanie:
• imienia i nazwiska
• wieku
• wzrostu
• aktualnego zdjęcia portretowego
• aktualnego zdjęcia sylwetki

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

SHORT FILM: "Forgive Me For What You'll Think"

Synopsis: ‘Alone in a church, a man attempts to confess his role in a tragedy, only to discover that judgment begins long before the truth is known...’

Role: Joseph
Looking for a Male aged 25–49. Joseph is emotionally restrained and conflicted. The performance relies on subtle shifts in thought and self-perception rather than displays of emotion

This role requires an actor capable of carrying a film through nuance, silence, and psychological complexity.

Production Details:
* Independent short film
* Filming in Derbyshire (Most likely Derby)
* One-day shoot
* Small crew (director and actor)
* **Unpaid Volenteer student production**
* Travel expenses will be paid if applicable

If interested, please submit:
* Headshot
* Acting CV (if available)
* Showreel (if available)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a self-tape using a scene from the script.

Contact at:

mathiasgeorgiadis1@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 NEW FACES WANTED – BOLLYWOOD FILM PROJECT 🎬

We’re looking for new faces to join a Bollywood film project – Project 79 filming in Coventry on 16th June 2026.

👥 Male & Female
📅 Age: 18–55 | 📅 16th of June
📍 Coventry
🚌 Birmingham pickup and drop-off available
⏰ Call Time: 8:00 AM
💷 Paid role

🌍 Ethnicity: Caucasian / White / Indian / Pakistani / Black / African

To apply, please send:
• Full Name
• Contact Number
• Recent Headshot
• Recent Full Body Photo
• Travel Plan (Birmingham pickup or driving)

📲 Join our WhatsApp group and send your details:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/LChWgCDmD4zJQDJsR0sdPU?s=cl&p=i&ilr=2

📧 Or email:
benaentertainmenthouse@gmail.com

⭐ NEW FACES ONLY ⭐

Feel free to share with friends and family who may be interested. If you refer someone and they are confirmed for the project, you’ll receive a referral bonus as a thank you! 🎉

items.text: Hej! Jestem zainteresowana grą w filmach i chętnie spróbuję swoich sił jako aktorka. Mam 14 lat i nigdy wcześniej nie grałam w żadnym filmie, ale to moje marzenie i bardzo chciałabym zdobyć pierwsze doświadczenie. Jeśli ktoś szuka kogoś początkującego, to chętnie podeślę więcej informacji 🙂

items.text:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor

items.text:
Gibt es jemanden, der aus Nähe Düsseldorf kommt und sich vorstellen könnte auch etwas mit Kindern zusammen zu machen? 
Wir schreiben unsere eigenen Lieder und brauchen jemanden, der dafür Beats produzieren könnte und auch die Möglichkeit hat zum Recorden.

Wenn dem so ist; einfach anschreiben, auch wenn die Nachricht im Spam landet, wir antworten auf jeden Fall. ￼

Danke im Voraus 🐥👑

items.text:
SEEKING CREATIVES
I am producing and directing a short film, "Anything It Takes" in early July, in Raleigh North Carolina. The film should be shot in a day, and the pay is $150, with a possible bonus depending on your performance

WE NEED

TWO ACTORS/ACTRESSES

AN AUDIO ENGINEER 

WE WOULD LIKE

An PA with experince in lighting.

We would like to have someone who is a TikTok creative or has some experience for one of the actors, but this is not a hard requirement. 

https://forms.gle/GRH1JrjF7UmBs9QW7

Any further information can be obtained my personal message or email

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.

items.text: Casting call!!

sharedPost.text:
🌟 REGALLY ROYAL PARTIES 🌟

CASTING CALL – 
CHILDREN’S ENTERTAINERS Southport , Liverpool , Preston!! 

Do you love performing, bringing characters to life, and creating magical memories for children? We are looking for enthusiastic performers to join our growing team!

We’re looking for people who are:

✨ Confident and outgoing
✨ Reliable and professional
✨ Great with children and families
✨ Energetic and enthusiastic
✨ Strong performers (acting, singing, dancing, or character work is a bonus)
✨ Able to work weekends and school holidays
✨ Team players with a positive attitude
✨ Passionate about making children’s dreams come true

📅 AUDITION DATES
25th June
26th June

What we offer:

👑 Competitive pay
👑 Exciting performance opportunities
👑 Flexible work! You set your schedule
👑 Ongoing training and support
👑 A fun and rewarding working environment

Join the magic and become part of the Regally Royal Parties family!

📲 To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp: 07889 288335

📧 Or email us: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com

Regally Royal Parties

Creating magical memories, one celebration at a time. ✨👑

🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026  
💸 Free submission (o

items.text:
**Do you ever feel like a song says it better than you ever could?**

**NOW CASTING — New York City & Surrounding**

**We're looking for music lovers in NYC who have someone special in their life they've always wanted to honor but never quite found the words. A parent. A best friend. A partner. A person who changed everything.**

**We want to turn your story into a personalized love song.**

**No music experience necessary (our professionals will handle that). Just need a great story and a whole lot of heart. Who would you write a song for?**

**1-2 hour (in person) commitment in the city. Must be able to self report! Exact date/location is TBD, estimated late June or early July shoot date. Compensation: $150 Flat Rate + customized song. For more details please email: ****[jess.w.casting@gmail.com](mailto:jess.w.casting@gmail.com)**

items.text:
Casting and Crew Call:

*Death by Felt — Horror/Comedy Short Film*

**No-budget indie production/Skeleton crew **

We are seeking passionate, self-motivated crew and actors for a horror-comedy short film about a group of friends terrorized by a voyeuristic killer — who happens to be a Muppet. Think *Scream* meets *The Muppets*. This is a fun, fast shoot with a small, collaborative team.

Roles:

Clarice - 20s, female, the final girl, stressed, she just wants to have a fun Halloween party

Gertrude - 20s, female, the host of the party

Crew needed:

AC

Producer

Sound designer

Composer

This project is unpaid, but it will be portfolio-worthy.

We are hoping to shoot in August and September.

Fill out the form for more info:
items.previewDescription: Death By Felt is a horror comedy about a group of friends who are hunted by a mysterious killer on Halloween night. Very original. What sets Death By Felt apart is that the killer is a puppet. So, we have a lot of the major roles cast for this project, but we have a few left. If they interest you, s...

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – ROOM FOR THOUGHT 🎥 TRAVEL EXPENSES COVERED ONLY 

We're looking for men and women to take part in the very first episode of **Room For Thought**, a brand-new social discussion series exploring real opinions, experiences, and perspectives.

🗣️ Episode Topic:
**Men vs Women: Can We Ever Understand Each Other?**

Participants will respond to thought-provoking statements such as:

• "Men have it harder in modern dating."
• "Women are judged more harshly by society."
• "Men are expected to hide their emotions."
• "Dating apps have made relationships worse."
• "Men and women can never truly understand each other."

This isn't about arguing or "winning" a debate. It's about having honest conversations, challenging perspectives, and finding common ground.

We're looking for:
✅ Men and women aged 18+
✅ Strong opinions and life experiences
✅ People comfortable sharing their views on camera
✅ Respectful and open-minded individuals

📍 London / Essex
🎥 Filmed for YouTube and social media
📅 28th June 2026

Interested?

Send us a DM with:
• Name
• Age
• Location
• A little bit about yourself
• Why you'd like to take part

All viewpoints are welcome.

Join the conversation.

#RoomForThought #CastingCall #MenVsWomen #SocialExperiment #Discussion #London #Essex #YouTube #Debate #Community

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA). 

Dear all further to my previous casting post. I really need more submissions on these 2 below characters kindly.

Project title to be announced. Shoot begins August (exact dates for each characterTBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses covered. 
Shoot location : In and around Birmingham area and other UK locations. 

Contact: Farhan Baqi 
farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk
Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link. 

It is extremely important to mention the character name you are applying for in the subject line of the email please (Makes my life easier 😛 )

I would like to add that most of the below characters have decent amount of dates, these are not one or two liners roles and therefore looking for experienced / trained actors 

Roles: 

LIZ (18–24): (Ginger hair)
One of the key characters on this production.
Fun, confident British Caucasion girl with ginger hair and an outgoing personality. Loyal, courageous, protective of friends. Must have a Birmingham or surrounding‑area accent (or be able to perform one). Musical background a plus but not essential. 

ANDRE – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Black / African British Third‑generation Caribbean Brit with charisma and rhythm. Natural performer with strong musical energy. Musical background ideal. 

Thank you

topComments.text:
Phil Kaye, 

I’ve noticed you’ve been commenting on several of my recent posts, so I wanted to address your concerns directly, although I’m still not entirely sure what the issue is. 

I am a London based Casting Director (and a Spotlight registered Actor) and an associate with Mukesh Chhabra Casting Company (MCCC), one of the leading and most reputable casting organisations in India. 

Many actors in this group and beyond can vouch for the legitimacy and professionalism of our work. 

If you have a specific concern, you are welcome to raise it with the group admin. 

I hope we can move past unnecessary comments going forward. 

Regards, FB
Be careful people, they are reposting it yet again

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn ‘’Leon’’  **

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ( Nie jesteśmy żadnym studiem czy agencją)  **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje mężczyzy w wieku 45 – 50 lat o obwodzie w klatce 100/105 cm, pas 95 - 105 ) do roli wuja głównej bohaterki. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia  realizujemy w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 2 3 tygodniowym.

** **

**Od kwietnia 2026 ** zaczęliśmy powoli  realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni.

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

**CASTING | TELEDYSK | GDYNIA / REWA / PÓŁWYSEP**

Szukamy aktorów do teledysku realizowanego w plenerze (plaża). Zdjęcia w tygodniu 22–26.06, termin uzależniony od pogody.

1. **POZYTYWNY DZIADEK** / 50–70 lat Wąs mile widziany.

1. **WNUCZEK LUB WNUCZKA** / 7–11 lat Chłopiec lub dziewczynka.

1. **PLAŻOWY SPRZEDAWCA KUKURYDZY** / mężczyzna 25–40 lat

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać w wiadomości prywatnej ze zdjęciem i krótką wizytówką video.

To those planning to audition on any date: please park in the rear of the church. OPAT is using the rectory (the rear, small auditorium) for our auditioning space- do not enter the chapel.

items.text:
**Looking for an iPhone Camera Operator**

Need someone for a one day shoot this Saturday (4 hours).

You'll be filming TikTok style content using:
* iPhone 17 Pro
* DJI wireless microphones
* Portable LED light

Equipment is provided. Just need an operator who knows how to move quickly, capture clean social content, and work comfortably with an iPhone setup.

Paid gig.

If interested, DM:
* Your experience shooting social content
* A few examples of your work

Location: Pasadena, CA
Date: Saturday
Duration: 4 hours
items.title: RECAP

topComments.text: Just DM’d you. I recently shot a social media video that got over 50 Million total combined views

Hi There,

I came across your ad on fb and wanted to reach out. I wanted to share my work :

You can also see more at:
www.instagram.com/cyrilmahe

https://www.instagram.com/reel/C7xpl2epqHt/?igsh=MTZpMXU5Y3AxM2FzdQ==

COMMERCIAL – EXTRAS

We are looking for people of African, Middle Eastern, or Asian descent to appear as extras in a commercial.

For a disco club scene. Background dancers on the dance floor.

Non-featured role

Application links:

🔹 Women, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/bd8b3f416035459e9fc5575486e7f5e4

🔹 Men, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/32ada6ac0d8146109f81b26b125d2a3a

📍 Shooting date: June 16
📍 Location: Warsaw
📍 Shooting schedule: Daytime

💰 Rate: PLN 300 per shooting day (paid in cash after filming)

📸 Requirements: Well-groomed appearance
📩 Please apply only through the link provided under the role description.

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR THE FULL MONTY. 

We are urgently looking for an actor of black/Asian decent to play Horse in our upcoming production of The Full Monty at the Louth Riverhead Theatre in sept. Our show is at risk of being cancelled if we can't find someone in the next week or so. Doesn't have to be Louth based but will need to get to some rehearsals and be available show week 8-12th September. Please get in touch urgently if anyone knows of anyone. This is an unpaid role. 

P.S the ad below says 40+ but could work with younger (around 25+)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'AUDITIONS! WANTED: HORSE BLACK/ASIAN ASIAN MALE (40+) THE THEEULI FULL MONTY LOUTH PLAYGOERS'

items.text:
# **Acting Headshot Day in Manchester**

Hi everyone,

I've had a number of enquiries from performers in and around Manchester, so I'm putting together an acting headshot day over the next couple of weeks.

I'll be working with a limited number of actors on the day to keep each session creative and tailored - with a focus on creating a range of strong, castable looks.

There are a couple of places left, so if you're based in Manchester (or regularly travel there) and are due a headshot update or looking to expand your casting range, feel free to comment below or send me a DM for details.

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk)

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -** *That's Deeply Human*

*That's Deeply Human* is a short film currently in pre-production, shooting in Bournemouth this summer. It's a contemporary psychological drama about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to feel things without outsourcing her emotions.

It's funny, it's real, and by the end it's devastating in the way only very ordinary things can be.

**THE ROLES**
*Thomas*: Late 20s to early 30s. Male. Anna's long distance boyfriend. Warm, present, genuinely loving. We need real emotional generosity and the ability to say everything with very little.

*Mila*: Late 20s. Female. Anna's new friend and colleague. Open, funny, naturally warm. The person who would reach Anna if Anna let her. We need easy charisma and genuine presence on screen.

**THE PRODUCTION**
This is a **voluntary** student thesis production from Bournemouth University's MA Filmmaking programme. Expenses like food and travel will be covered. The film will be submitted to festivals upon completion.

If this sounds like you, or someone you know, we'd love to hear from you. Please send a recent headshot, any self-tape or showreel material, and a short note about yourself and your interest in the role.

DM or contact at

qaldasm@gmail.com

utkuafacan1@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'casting call ABoumnemodhUniesty/astesP University Masters Production ABour SUPPORTING ROLES Mila: Female (20s-30s) Thomas: Male (20s-30s) Contact: qaldasm@gmail.com .com utkuafacan1@gmail.com utkuafacan 1@gmail.com That S Deeply Human is a contemporary short film about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to process her own emotions without the mediation of AI. It's funny, it' S quiet, and it's devastating. That'sDeeplyHuman That's Deeply Human Filming Dates Beginning of July'

items.text: Come along and find out about this thrilling play.

sharedPost.text:
Directors Talk:   Thursday 25th of June 7.30pm

2:22 A Ghost Story
 
By Danny Robins
Directed by Emily Dadson
 

Location: The Priory Playhouse, London Rd, Arundel BN18 9BZ
Rehearsals from:  31st of August
Performance Dates: 19 – 24 October 2026

The Plot
Jenny and Sam have recently moved into their new home and are in the process of renovating it. But something feels frightening and wrong. Very wrong. Over the baby monitor, at 2:22 every night, Jenny hears footsteps around her daughter's cot. 
When their friends Lauren and Ben come round for a housewarming dinner, they drink wine, relive their pasts, and argue about the existence of ghosts. They decide to stay up until 2:22, to discover the truth.
This is a fantastic opportunity for four strong actors to convince the audience of the existence of ghosts… or not.  
 
The Characters
● JENNY: Thirties, a young mother and primary-school teacher. Married to Sam.
● LAUREN: Late thirties/forties, Californian, a psychotherapist. Dating Ben.
● BEN: Thirties/forties, London accent, a builder. Dating Lauren.
● SAM: Late thirties/forties, a physics professor and writer.  Married to Jenny.
Important Information
The auditions will be held at The Priory Playhouse, London Rd, Arundel BN18 9BZ 
Find us on What3Words - ///crunching.spearhead.rewarding https://w3w.co/crunching.spearhead.rewarding
 
Due to the required secrecy of the plot, full scripts won’t be available until the play is cast. 
 
Details of audition pieces will be given out at the Director’s Talk.  If you’re unable to attend this or have specific questions, please contact Emily directly (emilydadson5@gmail.com)
 
 
All are welcome
 N.B. Non-members are welcome to attend the auditions. 
 
If cast you will be expected to join the company (£15.00) and pay a Production Fee of £15.00 to help towards the cost of scripts and the provision of teas and coffees at rehearsals.
 #whatson
#whatsonwestsussex
#arundelplayers
#sussextheatre
#theatreperformersinsussex
#arundelplayers

items.text:
Casting Call 🎬♟️🎧

Seeking 2 Black/Latin/Latin-x queer women (mid-20s to early-30s) for a dialogue short film about love, heartbreak, friendship- throughout a conversation has over the game of chess (the game correlates to the conversation and the song “this girl wants everything” by Isaia Huron.)￼

📍NYC Area - Washington Square Park
🎥 Non Union/Student
🗓️Filming on an early weekday/weekend morning 
Compensation: (unpaid) meals + footage + credit provided 
Shooting length: approximately 2-3 hours

“You spent the whole game trying to not lose one piece” (the queen) 

🎬Everything by Ana Selena 

Two queer black women meet at a park chess table for what seems like an ordinary game. As the match unfolds, one woman confides in her friend about loving someone who doesn’t seem to want the same future but wants everything. 

Roles: 

Maya (Lead)
Black/Latin/x woman, mid 20s to early 30s
Queer
Thoughtful, vulnerable, emotionally open. Maya is deeply in love with someone who she’d do anything for, but this person is not meeting her where she is. Most of the story lives in her expressions and quiet moments as much as the dialogue. 

Zuri (Supporting Lead)

Black/Latin/x woman, mid 20s to early 30s
Queer
Grounded, witty, observant. Zuri serves as Maya’s confidante and challenges her perspective through a game of chess. Strong conversational and naturalistic acting skills preferred. 

Submissions:

- headshots/recent photos 
- resume (if available, okay if not)
- reel or self tape 
- instagram handle (optional)

Email to to anaselenax@gmail.com 

Really looking forward to collaborate and shoot this creative project!! Shoot me an email or dm with any questions!!! 

This project is intended for creative portfolio use & social media release.

items.text:
CASTING CALL for feature film, “Astrogenesis” (astrogenesis.one).

No phone calls, DMs, texts. Emails to info@astrogenesis.one only. Must work local in Greensboro, NC USA

Astrogenesis (originally Nemesis Eterna) is a SAG Micro-budget (sub $20K) feature film from Srace Films,

ESP CoPro & Lunar Kitchen Films and originally began during the pandemic in North Carolina, USA but halted when filmmaker Victoria Srace Stone was disabled with Complex Regional Pain Syndrome.

Project is trans positive with female/gender-diverse/queer/diverse cast and crew. Gross profit sharing for all cast and crew. All lead and principal roles are paid. Director is disabled so shooting days will be 8 hours or less with frequent days off.

LOGLINE: A rebellious trans punk rocker mysteriously linked to a constellation of misfits and lost souls must partner with a hardened documentary journalist to uncover humanity’s alien origins before a shadowy renegade government agent’s machinations destroy Earth.

No nudity or sex, but some mature content). Certified Intimacy Coordinator on the production available.

Man of Shadows, 40-60: (lead antagonist)

Paid. Nondescript white male, long monologues, simple safe stunts, comfortable with physical prosthesis (no makeup or mask).

Raquel Villareal, 40-60: (supporting lead)

Paid. Nightclub manager, first generation Mexican immigrant, matter of fact, practical, concrete. Secretly religious (Catholic) but outwardly works in shady business. Bilingual desired.

London, 35-60: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Bartender, (any race/gender), loquacious, Master’s in English, prone to long stories, the opposite of a good listener but heart of gold.

Reese, 35-60: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing .Cook at Bev’s (any race/gender), tough as nails, jumped from job to job all over the world due to a rebellious, f**k it attitude, always looking for fight.

Jax, 25-50: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Punk rock band bassist, trans (male, non-binary, female or other), deep introvert but a musical snob, thinks Jett is an idiot but too introverted to get into other bands. Slow to anger but holds on grudges long.

Xris 25-50: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Pronounced Chris, punk rock drummer, trans (male, non-binary, female or other), party animal, always in trouble, always late, but fantastic drummer, bounced out of every band in town.

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Casting call in Berlin 

We’re currently looking for 3 talents for an upcoming lifestyle / UGC shoot:
• Indian woman (20–35)
• Indian man (25–45)
• Native English-speaking blonde/light hair woman (20–35)

No acting experience required - just natural energy and comfort in front of the camera. The shoot is relaxed, authentic, and focused on short-form content.

Interested applicants, please send an email with a few recent photos, casting form and your Instagram profile to the **marianna.vesku@nymph.so**

Zgłoszenia z danymi, wiekiem, nr telefonu I aktualnymi zdjęciami proszę przesyłać na maila justyna@sceneria.com.pl z tytułem STRAJK 23.06

**UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - CZERWIEC**

1. **KOMISARZ (40-50 lat) 19.06**, kilka zdań, 250 zł płatne po planie

📩 Mailowo proszę przesłać informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, numer telefonu oraz materiały: wideo wizytówkę, aktualne zdjęcia i informacje o doświadczeniu. 

Zgłoszenia kierujemy na: [patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl](mailto:patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl) w tytule wpisując nazwę roli.

Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

sharedPost.text:
HAPPY (BELATED) 2 YEARS SINCE I WAS FILMED FOR NETFLIX’S GANDHI!!! 

Gandhi is a biographical historical drama television series created and directed by Hansal Mehta. Produced by Applause Entertainment, the series depicts the life of Mahatma Gandhi, based on the books ‘Gandhi Before India’ and ‘Gandhi: The Years That Changed the World’ by Ramachandra Guha. The series is planned to span three seasons. Series one is set between 1888 to 1915 was completed in August 2024.

SYNOPSIS: The show follows Gandhi’s early life, starting in colonial India as a curious teenager, then as a shy law student in London, and finally as a young lawyer who spends 23 life-changing years in South Africa. 

‘Police Officer’ is a non-fictional character who held the rank of a constable. Despite being English, he was stationed in Durban (South Africa) during the British Empire’s rule over the country. He was armed with a wooden baton and was a colleague of Constable Rowling. In January of 1897, Gandhi was attacked by a mob in Durban Harbour. While on duty, ‘Police Officer’ along with three other unnamed coppers assisted Rowling in saving a young Gandhi’s life by charging into the crowd and fighting off protesters. The small police force were successful in preventing Gandhi being hung to death by the huge mob. 

EPISODE: Series 1, Episode 5 

FILMING LOCATION: Whitby Harbour, Whitby, North Yorkshire 

CALL/WRAP TIME: 8:00AM-21:30PM (8th June 2024)

FUN FACTS: 
- I had to take a day away from my camping holiday due to being cast very last minute. 
- ‘Police Officer’ is the first non-fictional character I have played for the screen and professionally. 
- My moustache was drawn on by the amazing hair and makeup department. 
- I was sewn into my costume ; This meant I couldn’t take it off all day!
- The series had its world premiere in the ‘Primetime Programme’ of the 2025 Toronto International Film Festival on 17 September 2025 (On my birthday).
- While being chased by the 150+ person crowd, on the first take an extra NEARLY fell off the harbour wall into the sea. 
- The harbour I was filmed at can also be seen in Sky Cinema’s The Radley’s

#netflixgandhi #actor #perioddrama #tv #netflix

items.text:
I’m thrilled to announce that for July’s class we have West End associate director Dewi Johnson coming in to run a masterclass in Restoration Comedy!

IRestoration is bold, witty, status-driven theatre — if you’re looking for a modern comparison think Blackadder or Ghosts.

Dewi has directed in the West End alongside Steve Coogan, Carrie Hope Fletcher, Mel Giedroyc, David Mitchell, and Gemma Whelan. 
He knows his stuff — and he’s brilliant with actors.

During the session, we’ll break down the text together, then perform it in small groups so everyone gets to work and everyone gets direction.

No experience of the style needed. Just bring your curiosity.

WHEN: Saturday 18th July, 2–5pm

WHERE: The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

PRICE: £38 | Places are limited

Message or email estherstanford@icloud.com to book.

#theworkshopactorsstudio #birminghamactingclass #actingclass #restorationcomedy actingmasterclass westenddirector

3 DAYS TO GO! 💨

Train in ways that both challenge and excite you.🕺💃

Come join our community! 🫶

Train for Authenticity, Perform with Power. 🎭🎬

Unleash your authentic self and discover new emotional depths in your performances. The Meisner technique transforms more than just your acting—it transforms you.

Class is limited to 12 students.

Meisner Technique - Intro & Repetition Skills
Book Now @ www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
 Consent-informed connection and sustainable emotional exploration - unlock your true potential!

📅 Course Details:
* Dates: Wednesdays, 4 pm – 7 pm
* Duration: 17 June - 22nd July
* Location: Marylebone, London
* Class Size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention

🎟️ What’s Included: ✅ Six guided in-person sessions ✅ 1 personalised feedback session ✅ 1 FREE drop-in Actor Training Session for continued practice 🎉

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced actor looking to refresh your skills, this course will help you tap into deeper dynamics and develop truthful behaviour in your work.

💰 Fees:
* £225 for 20+ hours of training
* £205 each if you bring a friend (save £20 each!) 💥

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

items.text:
🎭 AUDITIONS – JACK ABSOLUTE FLIES AGAIN 🎭

Join us on Wednesday 18 June at 7:00pm at the Harlequin Theatre for auditions for Jack Absolute Flies Again.

Set during the Battle of Britain in 1940, this fast-paced comedy follows RAF pilot Jack Absolute as he returns home determined to win back the heart of his former love, Lydia Languish. Inspired by Sheridan's classic comedy The Rivals, the play is packed with mistaken identities, romantic misunderstandings, larger-than-life characters and plenty of laugh-out-loud moments.

With its blend of wartime spirit, romance and farce, Jack Absolute Flies Again offers a wide range of exciting roles and a fantastic opportunity for performers of all experience levels.

Check out our audition's page on our website: www.harlequinplayers.com/auditions

📅 Auditions: Wednesday 18 June

🕖 Time: 7:00pm

📍 Venue: Harlequin Theatre

We look forward to seeing you there!

items.text:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨

items.text:
*****Extended Deadline + Adjusted Stipend*****

# Stagebugz Theatre is still seeking actors for "Cryptophasia"!

The deadline to submit a video audition for this world premiere production has been extended through 12 PM (noon) on Sunday, June 14th.

## **Dates:**

**Rehearsals- **June 25th through July 18th, scheduled around actor availability (A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *HERE***)** 

**Tech rehearsals- **July 20th-22nd 

**Performances-** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM

## **Compensation:** 

Actors will be paid a guaranteed $100 stipend, plus portion of net profits

***For More Information and to Submit An Audition, Visit: ****https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions*

TRUMAN- 30S-50SM M SHOW DATES JULY 23RD, 24TH 25, AND 26TH VIDEO AUDITIONS 60 60-90SECOND CONTEMPORARY MONOLOGUE $100 STIPEND!! FORMORE FOR MORE INFORMATION AND TO SUBMIT'

items.text:
Commercial Casting (Finance Ad)!

Paid! Filming in Denver, June 15th

Looking for:

1 Male (45-65yo) + 1 Female (45-65yo) to play a married couple.

1 Male (25-35yo) + 1 Female (25-35yo) to play newlyweds.

1 Male (45-65yo) to play a construction worker.

1 Male (35-50yo) to play a bank teller.

Please email kodocasting@gmail.com with your headshot, resume, and reel if interested. Thank you!

topComments.text: Why aren’t they going to local agencies?

items.text:
WARSZAWA
SZUKAM AKTORÓW i statystów do teledysku. 

2 Starszych mężczyzn do roli policjantów

3 Mężczyzn (18-25lat) 

1 Starszego Pana do roli ochroniarza 

3 Kobiet w wieku 18-30

1 Kobiete z małym dzieckiem 1-4 lata lub w ciąży

8 statystów w młodym wieku 18-25 

Jest to bardzo szybki plan zdjęciowy maksymalnie 1.5h zdjęć dla każdej roli. 

Płatność gotówką odrazu po planie

user.name: The Workshop Professional Actors Studio Birmingham

items.text:
I’m thrilled to announce that for July’s class we have West End associate director Dewi Johnson coming in to run a masterclass in Restoration Comedy!

IRestoration is bold, witty, status-driven theatre — if you’re looking for a modern comparison think Blackadder or Ghosts.

Dewi has directed in the West End alongside Steve Coogan, Carrie Hope Fletcher, Mel Giedroyc, David Mitchell, and Gemma Whelan. 
He knows his stuff — and he’s brilliant with actors.

During the session, we’ll break down the text together, then perform it in small groups so everyone gets to work and everyone gets direction.

No experience of the style needed. Just bring your curiosity.

WHEN: Saturday 18th July, 2–5pm

WHERE: The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

PRICE: £38 | Places are limited

Message or email estherstanford@icloud.com to book.

#theworkshopactorsstudio #birminghamactingclass #actingclass #restorationcomedy actingmasterclass westenddirector

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EDINBURGH FRINGE 2026 (NEW WRITING) OXFORD BASED
We are seeking a male actor (playing age 17–20) for the role of Ruairi O’Shea in William Street by Chloe Downes, heading to the Edinburgh Fringe Festival 2026.

Following a successful Oxford run (excellent audience response), we are remounting the production for Edinburgh Fringe with a small, tight-knit ensemble cast.

ABOUT THE PLAY

William Street is a gripping new drama set in Derry during the Troubles, exploring the impact of political conflict on one family at the centre of the violence  the O’Shea family.

At the heart of the story is Ruairi O’Shea, the youngest son, who becomes increasingly influenced by the violence surrounding him and is drawn towards extremist beliefs. As tensions rise within the family, Ruairi’s journey becomes central to a story about loyalty, ideology, and the personal cost of conflict.

The play explores love, betrayal, identity, and sacrifice as political unrest fractures a family from within.

KEY DETAILS

* Edinburgh Fringe Festival: 13th–22nd August 2026

* Rehearsals: June–August (must have strong availability)

* Small ensemble cast (5 actors total)

* Fast-paced, collaborative rehearsal process

* Must be fully available for the full Fringe run

WE ARE LOOKING FOR

* Male actor, playing age 17–20

* Strong dramatic ability and emotional range

* Confident working in ensemble-driven theatre

* Northern Irish accent (or strong ability to adopt one)

* Reliable, committed, and available for rehearsals + Fringe run

TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot & CV

* Brief note of interest

* Availability (June–August)

* Spotlight/showreel (if available)

Self-tape details will be sent to selected applicants.

📩 Apply to: thefifthactco@gmail.com

We are casting on a rolling basis and aim to move quickly once the right performer is found.

Company info

Instagram: @thefifthactco

Website: thefifthactcompany.co.uk

NOW CASTING!!!!! 

THIS COULD BE THE OPPORTUNITY OF A LIFETIME 

Have you ever dreamed of traveling the world, changing lives, and getting paid to tell incredible human stories?

We’re casting charismatic duos to become the faces of a major philanthropy YouTube channel, traveling across the globe and meeting people whose stories deserve to be seen and heard.

We’re looking for:

 Couples

 Best Friends

 Siblings

 Dynamic Duos

If you have amazing chemistry, a magnetic personality, a sense of adventure, and a genuine passion for helping others, we want to hear from you.

Apply at: MysticArt Pictures

#philanthropy #payitforward #TeamMystic #casting

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.text:
**Gesucht: Männer & Frauen aus Deutschland ab 30 für kurze Handy-Videos – 100 €**

Für ein Werbe-/Contentprojekt im Bereich digitales

Gesundheitsangebot & ärztlich begleitetes Gewichtsmanagement suchen wir authentische Privatpersonen aus Deutschland ab 30 Jahren für kurze Videos im Selfie-Stil.

Wir suchen bewusst keine Fitness-Influencer, Models oder perfekt inszenierten Werbegesichter, sondern normale Menschen mit natürlicher, glaubwürdiger Ausstrahlung.

Worum geht es?
* 1 kurzes Smartphone-Video
* Länge: ca. 15–30 Sekunden
* natürlicher Selfie-Stil
* Text/Briefing wird von uns gestellt
* Aufwand gering
* Vergütung: 100 €

Wichtig:
* Deutschsprachig
* natürliche Ausstrahlung
* keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
* kein professionelles Setup nötig
* aktuelle Fotos oder kurzes Beispielvideo zur Einschätzung 

Besonders passend sind Menschen, die sich glaubwürdig in Themen wie Alltag, Gesundheit, Gewichtsmanagement oder Abnehmen wiederfinden.

Zur Einordnung: Es geht um ein digitales Gesundheitsangebot rund um medizinisch begleitetes Abnehmen. Persönliche Behandlungserfahrungen sollen nur genannt werden, wenn sie wirklich vorhanden sind. Alternativ sind auch gescriptete Info-/Werbevideos möglich, ohne dass eine eigene Behandlungserfahrung behauptet wird.

Bei Interesse bitte melden mit:
* Vorname
* Alter
* Wohnort
* aktuellem Foto
* optional kurzem Beispielvideo / Sprachaufnahme
* kurzer Info, ob eigene Erfahrung mit Gewichtsmanagement / Abnehm-Themen vorhanden ist

topComments.text: Hallo. Ich habe großes Interesse und würde gerne teilnehmen. Wohin darf ich meine Angaben bzw. Fotos usw. hinschicken? Liebe Grüße Daniel

sharedPost.text:
Liebe Filmschaffende,
Faire Gagen läuft derzeit  nur noch auf Sparflamme und Du kannst das ändern. 
Gesucht werden möglichst aktive Filmschaffende im Bereich Komparserie und/oder Darstellung.

Dabei  unterstützt oder leitest Du eine äußerst beliebte und erfolgreiche Marke unter Filmschaffenden in Form von Beiträgen, informieren über beispielhafte oder unfaire Gesuche oder mit eigenen Ideen.

Engagier Dich für ein Ehrenamt, ganz ohne Druck bei absolut freier Zeiteinteilung 🤗
Gerne PN an Faire Gagen oder Klaus Stutzer

sharedPost.text:
+++ Agentur Producers Friend vs. Agentur Filmgesichter u.a. Agenturen +++

Ein bekannter Berliner Podcast bekommt die Frage: "Was sagt ihr zur Komparsen-Agentur Producer's Friend?" Die ehrliche Antwort folgt...

(Lesezeit ca. 3 Min.)

Seit vielen Jahren hat Faire Gagen und ein Großteil seiner Anhängerschaft eine klare Meinung zu diesem Vergleich. Ganz ähnlich sehen dies auch die Moderatoren Frank und Thomas beim beliebten Berliner Podcast "Frisch vom Set".

Hauptkritikpunkt ist auch hier das  als unfair angesehene Geschäftsmodell der Agentur.
Nur zwei kurze Zitate: "Selbst ohne Drehtag wird abgebucht" oder "Der Name der Agentur Producer's Friends sagt eigentlich schon alles ..."

Als besonders faires Gegenbeispiel wird u.a. im Podcast die größte Berliner Agentur, Filmgesichter genannt. 
Aber auch sehr viele andere Agenturen in Berlin, NRW, Hamburg und teilweise sogar in München zeigen uns tagtäglich und seit sehr vielen Jahren, dass es auch fair und damit gleichzeitig komparsenfreundlich oder "Extras Friends" funktioniert.

Aber wie auch im Podcast und mehrfach auch von uns an alle Filmschaffende appelliert:

+++ Wir alle müssen selbst entscheiden für was wir uns wert sind zu drehen +++

+++ Dabei dürfen wir jedoch nicht  vergessen, dass wir mit diesen - nunmal in unserem Sektor völlig unüblichen - Geldern doppelt bezahlen, da ja bereits die Produktionen unsere Agenturen und damit unsere Gagen bezahlen.
Leider setzen "wir" (ob bewusst oder unbewusst) unsere vielen fair agierenden Agenturen damit jedoch zwangsläufig einem nicht unerheblichen Wettbewerbsnachteil am Markt aus +++

So müssen "wir" uns selbstkritisch hinterfragen:

"Ist es fair, wenn wir uns unsere Drehtage bei Agentur PP förmlich erkaufen und womöglich gleichzeitig bei Filmgesichter (Berlin, NRW) Wanted, Müller, Connection Berlin... (Berlin) 
Schwichtenberg, Ohler, WIWA, Eick&Weber... (NRW) Glocker ... (München) und den vielen anderen fairen Agenturen kostenlos (bzw. für zumindest überschaubare Gebühren) deren Fairness gerne mitnehmen um nicht zu sagen, einzusacken?
 
So liegt es (noch!) in unserer Hand, ob auch weiterhin unsere fairen Agenturen am Markt bleiben und nicht z.B. bedingt durch finanzielle Schieflagen sterben oder eben (notgedrungen) ähnlich bezahlte Geschäftsmodelle für uns entwerfen müssen um zu überleben (Beisp. DBF, München).

In unseren persönlichen Gesprächen mit den Agenturleitungen konnte man immerwieder heraushören, dass dieser Weg eigenlich nicht deren Philosophie sei - auch, da sie vor ihrer Agenturgründung oft selbst als Komparsen gearbeitet haben und unsere Arbeit, aber auch unsere Initiative recht gut kennen und damit unsere Beweggründe sehr gut verstehen. 
Die Lage ist jedoch teilweise recht ernst, wie bereits die Verbreitung von sogenannte Premium Modellen aufzeigt.

(Bitte gerne  (nur) auf "Faire Gagen" teilen o. zumindest reagieren, da nur so unsere textlastigen Beiträge eine wichitige Verbreitung finden. Danke🙂)

+++ Link zum Podcast und weitere Infos in der Kommentarleiste nur auf Faire Gagen 
 
Liebe Grüße 
Klaus
Initiative Faire Gagen 

... und nicht  zuletzt: Faire Gagen Sucht Nachwuchs🤗

#kompase #casting #filmschaffende #agenturen

items.text:
Casting Call: Athletic Female Model/Actress (18–30)
Location: Ontario, CA (or relatively close)

Shoot Date: June 18, 19 or 20th 

Compensation: $100 for 3-4 hours of work, plus any meals/snacks -- not negotiable

I am reshooting a project and I have an immediate need to cast a physically fit or athletic female model/actress (18–30) for an educational video project that will be shown to junior/community college students at a school in Southern California. This short-form documentary aims to explore the real-life accessibility and lifestyle challenges faced during a temporary injury requiring the use of crutches and a fiberglass splint and/or cast on the leg.

About the Role:

You’ll portray an individual recovering from a temporary lower-limb injury, navigating public spaces and day-to-day activities. Scenes may include attempting to use stairs, accessing public buildings, malls, shopping, navigating campus hallways, and more—while using crutches and a medical-grade cast/splint (provided). The shoot will be filmed in one day in 3-4 hours, but crafted to look like multiple days.

Ideal Candidate:

• Female, 18–30 years old

• Athletic, active, or fitness-oriented (to contrast with sudden mobility loss)

• Based in the greater Los Angeles area 

• Comfortable with physical activity on crutches

• Natural presence on camera; able to convey authentic emotion

• Will be required to bring different outfits shoes, and a few different items (backpack, etc), but the cast/splint and crutches are provided.

• Prior modeling or acting experience is a plus, but not required

• Prior injury experience, experience with crutches and/or a cast is also a plus, but not required

Project Highlights:

• Educational, socially conscious content

• Documentary-style, mostly improvised lines, with some lines and general content provided

• Produced for classroom use to foster empathy and accessibility awareness

• Safe, supportive environment with clear direction and assistance

• Ability to get creative and add to this project based on your past experience and experience during the shoot

To Apply:

Please send me a direct message, respond in the comments or  email Brettsmithh316@gmail.com the following information:

• Full name and age

• Headshot and full-body photo

• Short intro (ideally a video) about yourself and why you’re interested, including previous acting/modeling experience, athletic experience, and cast/crutches experience (if any!)

• Relevant experience (performance, sports, with injury or cast/crutches etc.)

• General availability this this Thursday, Friday or Saturday 

Note: All equipment (crutches, splint/cast) will be provided. The cast is non-permanent and purely for demonstration and will be applied/removed safely.

📅 29–31 October 2026

sharedPost.text:
🦜 "I believed until the grand age of 21 that my childhood budgie had flown into the washing machine green and emerged, post-cycle, alive but completely devoid of colour."

Meet the cast! Kicking off our individual introductions is the brilliant Rebecca Barber, who will be playing Miller this October.

🎭 About Rebecca:
Finding love on stage in Secondary School with a production of Cats, Rebecca went on to study Acting and Musical Theatre at Oldham College. After a decade-long hiatus, she joined the committee of Rochdale Musical Theatre Company (RMTC) in 2022 for two consecutive years, and has since been involved with the production of local theatre both on and off the stage.
Her recent roles include Susy Henderson in Wait Until Dark (Saddleworth Players), Ensemble in Beauty and the Beast, and Whitney in Legally Blonde (both RMTC).
🦇 On Playing Miller:
"I am so excited to be playing Miller. She is practical, outspoken, and never afraid to say exactly what she thinks, bringing plenty of humour and personality to the story. I can’t wait to explore this character and be part of such a bold and inventive retelling of a classic tale."
🤪 The Gullibility Chronicles
In addition to a strong sense of justice, Rebecca admits to a chronic sense of gullibility. Notable examples include asking the entire avenue for “a long stand”, searching high and low for a tin of “tartan paint”, wearing out the double VHS tapes of Titanic in 6 months, and crying in guilt over the pecking order of an extensive stuffed-animal collection. It does beg the question: how did an ND diagnosis take 32 years?

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill 
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel. Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

**NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED!**

items.text:
Hey everyone! My name is Hannah and I’m on the casting team for a new short film, PRESTO, that is currently looking for CHILD VIOLIN PLAYERS who appear around 7-10 YEARS OLD.

For the speaking roles, THIS IS A PAID OPPORTUNITY! NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED, JUST VIOLIN PROFICIENCY!

SHOOT DATES: 3 days between JULY 16th-
19th.

Location: Vancouver, BC

All details are below. 

If you are a good fit and interested in applying, please email: prestoshortfilm@gmail.com

Also, if you happen to have any potential leads as to where I should look or know anyone who should apply, feel free to DM me. Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'presto Casting Call Genre: Dark Comedy Runtime: 10-75 min Description: An ancient curse, α manic single mother, and an indomitable, plushy wielding nemesis stand between young Jack and his dream of recital champion. items.text:
✨ WE'RE RECRUITING ✨
Do you love performing, storytelling and creating magical moments for children?

Perfect Like Me Parties is looking for enthusiastic, reliable and confident performers to join our growing team.

We're looking for individuals who are passionate about helping children feel seen, celebrated and represented through engaging character experiences, storytelling, games and imaginative play.

This role could be perfect for:

🎭 Actors

🎤 Singers

💃 Dancers

🎓 Performing Arts & Musical Theatre Students

👶 Individuals with experience working with children

We offer:

✨ Flexible weekend work

✨ Paid opportunities

✨ Performance experience

✨ Ongoing support and training

✨ The chance to make a real difference to children's confidence and self-belief

We're particularly interested in performers who are warm, energetic, professional and love interacting with children.

📍 London, Berkshire & Surrounding Areas

📧 To apply, please send your CV, headshot and a short introduction to:

Planned2perfection_yas@outlook.com

items.text:
Documentarian/Presenter Romford, Essex
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for a presenter/documentary host for an unpaid passion-project documentary filming on Saturday 25th July.

The documentary follows a real-life wizard who spends his days healing trees, wandering the streets, and creating magical and unexpected interactions with members of the public. The film will explore who he is, why he does what he does, and the impact he has on the people he meets.

I’m looking for someone with a style similar to Louis Theroux — naturally curious, observant, witty, and comfortable engaging with unusual characters and situations. The ideal person will be confident on camera, able to ask thoughtful questions, and willing to immerse themselves in the story while guiding the audience through the experience.

Please note that this role is unpaid. This is a genuine passion project, with a small team of creatives donating their time and skills, including videographers, a photographer, and an editor. While there is no budget for talent, it’s a great opportunity to gain experience, build your showreel, collaborate with other creatives, and be part of a unique documentary story.

We’re looking for someone who is:

* Naturally inquisitive and engaging

* Comfortable interviewing strangers and contributors

* Able to balance humour with genuine curiosity

* Relaxed and authentic on camera

* Interested in documentary storytelling

If you’re happy to volunteer your time and have ever wanted to front a documentary about one of the most unusual and fascinating characters you’ll meet, I’d love to hear from you.

Please send a brief introduction, any relevant experience, and links to previous on-camera work if available.

Slightly differant to a standard acting role , but i'm looking for a funny comedic male good on camera for a you Tube video with well known KSI for his you tube channel very last minute tomorrow 

central London 1.30pm till 4.30pm

This will be good for anyone wanting exposure and experience  working on set of a high profile you tube video and fee paying £175.00

looking for someone extroverted and a funny personality !

if anyone is suitable and keen please comment below or DM me, thankyou xx

central London 1.30pm till 4.30pm 

Must be between the ages of 40 and 55 yrs please for this role and must be single as its comedy dating show style content ,

This will be good for anyone wanting exposure and experience  working on set of a high profile you tube video and fee paying £175.00

looking for someone extroverted and a funny personality !

if anyone is suitable and keen please comment below or DM me, thankyou xx

items.text:
🌹✨ Meine neue Homepage ist online! ✨🌹

Mit großer Freude möchte ich euch meine neue Webseite vorstellen:

🌐 https://sabrina-kreativprojekte.beepworld.de/

Auf dieser Seite nehme ich euch mit auf meine kreative Reise als Autorin und Projektentwicklerin.

📖 Geschichten und Buchprojekte
🎭 Theater, Bühne und Kreativität
🎵 Musik- und Songprojekte
✨ IMPÉRIA – LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE
💡 Visionen und Herzensprojekte

🚧 Die Webseite befindet sich aktuell noch im Aufbau und wird von mir nahezu täglich erweitert und weiterentwickelt.

📝 Besonders würde ich mich freuen, wenn ihr mir einen Eintrag in meinem Gästebuch hinterlasst. Jeder Gruß, jedes Feedback und jeder Gedanke bedeuten mir sehr viel und helfen mir, meinen kreativen Weg weiterzugehen.

Vielen Dank für euren Besuch und eure Unterstützung. ❤️

🌹 Sabrina van der Felden
Autorin & Kreativprojekte

Diese Webseite gibt Einblicke in meine kreativen Arbeiten, meine Visionen und die Welt von IMPÉRIA- LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE. Kreativität bedeutet für mich, Ideen lebendig werden zu lassen, Menschen zu berühren und neue Welten zu erschaffen. Ich freue mich, Sie auf meiner kreativen Reise begrüßen zu dürfen. Herzlichst Sabrina van der Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte'

items.text:
CASTING CALL - FEMALE ACTOR / MODEL

Music Video

I am looking for an actress/model for my music video for a song I will release at the beginning of July. As the song is unreleased, I will send it once I have selected an actress.

Female - 25-35 years old - Open to all looks

Location: Around Berlin (Warschauer Str., Mitte, Kreuzberg)

Date: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

Duration: 1 day shoot of 5-6 hours, it will be a “run and gun” style shoot. I will have every shot planned and plan to move quickly.

Pay: I do not have the funds to pay, but snacks and drinks will be provided throughout the shoot, and I will provide a restaurant dinner/drinks for our small crew and cast, once the shoot is finished.

The video will follow a woman who is simply enjoying living and the little things on a normal day. The actress must casually portray independence and self-appreciation with every step. The video will be following her throughout her day as she enjoys the weather, walking around Berlin, riding the subway, sitting by the canal/Spree drinking wine/coffee, reading a book, listening to music, etc. She will be speaking some of the lyrics throughout the video, but not performing them. She will say them as if she is thinking positively and talking to herself with a smirk.

The song is called “Learned That Day” and is about how someone had an intense experience in a relationship that fell apart. But she has persevered and found herself to be more capable than ever.

Here is a video I released in March. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB)

However, the video for "Learned That Day” will have a more casual vibe with no direct performance shots.

Please email headshots, Instagram handle, and a reel if you have one to the email below. Feel free to send any questions if you have them.

CONTACT: 

Email: [philbettermusic@gmail.com](mailto:philbettermusic@gmail.com)

Instagram: @PhilBetter

Thank you and have a great week!

Philip / PhilBetter

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. This project is non-union.

items.text:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

**4.      Customer (Voice role): Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

Calling into customer support and speaks with Kenneth. Is angry and hostile as he has a technical support problem that he wants fixed not now, but “Right Now”. Has a verbal back and forth with the lead character Kenneth as he tries to resolve the issue.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

items.summary:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

items.text:
Wo Gestaltung auf Darstellung trifft.

Wir freuen uns sehr, Marco Marcu als Hausvogt auf der Bühne und als Designer hinter den Kulissen Teil unseres Jedermann-Ensembles zu wissen. Zu seinen Entwürfen zählen unter anderem das Kleid der Buhlschaft und das des Glaubens.

Informationen & Tickets:

www.jedermann-theater.de
